song.title: More About Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) More about Jesus would I know, More of His grace to others show; More of His saving fulness see, More of His love who died for me.
[C] Chorus More, more about Jesus, More, more about Jesus; More of His saving fulness see, More of His love who died for me.
[V2] 2) More about Jesus let me learn, More of His holy will discern; Spirit of God my teacher be, Showing the things of Christ to me.
[V3] 3) More about Jesus; in His Word, Holding communion with my Lord; Hearing His voice in every line, Making each faithful saying mine.
[V4] 4) More about Jesus; on His throne, Riches in glory all His own; More of His kingdom’s sure increase; More of His coming, Prince of Peace.
song.author: Eliza Edmunds Hewitt
